name: Prior Auth MAF
postAttachCommand: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/.devcontainer-setup-complete ]; then echo ""; echo "✅  Environment setup complete — ready to deploy!"; echo "    Next: azd auth login && az login && azd up"; echo ""; else echo ""; echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"; echo "║  ⏳  ENVIRONMENT SETUP IN PROGRESS — PLEASE WAIT            ║"; echo "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "║  Dependencies are still being installed:                    ║"; echo "║    • Azure CLI  • azd  • Python packages  • npm packages    ║"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "║  ⚠️  DO NOT run azd up yet — tools may not be ready.        ║"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "║  Monitor progress: Codespaces menu > View Creation Log      ║"; echo "║  This banner disappears once setup is complete.             ║"; echo "║                                                              ║"; echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"; echo ""; fi'
